TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Eric_Bledsoe, title = Eric_Bledsoe, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eric_Bledsoe} }

S.FORM: Eric Bledsoehya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Eric Bledsoe, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Eric Bledsoehya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Eric Bledsoe, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
